## Invariant impact
<!-- The 7 invariants live in the spec §2. Tick one. -->
- [ ] **No invariant bent** (no internet required / pure flooding / uniformity / sealed-sender / self-destruct / no-server / gathering-scope)
- [ ] **Bends an invariant or changes a public claim** → requires CTO sign-off (explain below)

## Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] Tests added and **green** (paste/where to find output)
- [ ] App runs / change observed to work — not just compiles
- [ ] In-repo AI fan-out review: **clean** (link the review report)
- [ ] `@codex review`: **clean** (once Codex is installed)
- [ ] `/security-review`: **clean** (required for crypto / protocol / transport changes)
- [ ] PR is small and self-contained
